heroInsight: Carousels are crushing it with a stunning 54% of all posts and an average of 178 likes per post, making them the unmatched king of gymfluencer content.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels are dominating the scene with high engagement, while Reels remain potent but with less aggressive growth. Static posts are lagging with lower average likes.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels continue to perform well, especially for quick transformations and PR clips. First 3 seconds retention is key.

data.name: Carousel
data.note: Carousels are seeing massive save rates and engagement, as evidenced by top posts like @sammomyy's with over 23,000 likes.

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories remain an essential format for engagement, especially for quick updates and polls.

data.name: Static
data.note: Static posts are less engaging compared to other formats, with average likes significantly lower.

trendingHooks.template: I stopped [X] and here's what happened
trendingHooks.example: I stopped tracking macros and here's what happened
trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Creates a curiosity gap and invites followers to comment with their experiences.

trendingHooks.example: POV: You're hitting a deadlift PR and the gym goes silent
trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Relatable scenarios drive engagement and sharing among gym-goers.

trendingHooks.example: I tried intermittent fasting for 30 days
trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Challenges intrigue viewers and prompt them to follow along for results.

trendingHooks.example: Why I stopped using lifting straps
trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Provokes interest and debate, encouraging comments and shares.
Gamifies fitness goals and invites community participation.

postingTimes.summary: Maximize engagement by posting when followers are most active.

hotTopics.detail: Body transformation posts are trending with a 500% increase, perfect for showcasing long-term fitness journeys.

brandSignals.actionable: Be the first to review and showcase new YoungLA drops.

brandSignals.detail: Prime's engagement is skyrocketing with an average of 823 likes per post.

brandSignals.actionable: Include Prime in supplement stack posts to ride the viral wave.

brandSignals.detail: Dfyne's mentions are climbing with 10 posts and an avg engagement of 165 likes.

brandSignals.actionable: Feature Dfyne gear in fit checks to leverage rising brand momentum.

critical: DM shares are now the #1 engagement signal, 3-5x more valuable than likes.
Saves constitute 25% of ranking power; use 'save this' CTAs in carousels.
First 3 seconds of Reels are crucial for reach — hook viewers immediately.
Originality is key: 10+ reposts in 30 days can result in shadowban.
Carousels rival Reels for engagement, driven by save and DM share metrics.
proTips: Post carousel content at 6-7AM for 40% higher save rates in the gym demographic.
Use 'save this' CTAs in slide 3-4 of carousels to drive collection adds.
Include a 'DM this to a friend' prompt in Reels to leverage the top engagement signal.
Highlight unique angles or tips in your captions to increase originality score.
Integrate trending audio into Reels early; audio boosts retention and discoverability.

tiktokCrossover.summary: TikTok trends like #musclebuilding are surging and yet to fully hit IG, offering a first-mover advantage.

hotPosts.whyViral: Teagan's post about bulking received high engagement with 17988 likes and 228 comments, indicating a strong connection with the audience. The carousel format and personal journey narrative create a relatable and engaging story.
hotPosts.takeaway: Use personal stories and progress updates to create relatable content that encourages audience interaction.

hotPosts.whyViral: This post speculates on a popular figure's return to competition, generating 7801 likes and 93 comments. The intrigue and speculation around a well-known personality drive engagement.
hotPosts.takeaway: Leverage trending topics and speculation about popular figures to spark discussion and engagement.
